name: tlc-rack-tubebox-and-tank-solvent-reuse
title: TLC rack tube-box surface + developing-tank solvent reuse
description: Req1: chemist tube-box surface is the TLC rack (not workbench; workbench user-controlled items are only tank lid / developing tank / silica plates) — affects portal consumable page + lab config. Req2: developing tank contents recorded in tlc_inventory.properties (solvent system + ratio); TLCPlanner reuses a matching prepared tank before the 配液 step, else preps as today.
creator: Drake
